question: Does the response generate exactly three images corresponding to the specified subjects: (1) front elevation of main stage, (2) overhead seating layout, and (3) close-up of entrance effects?
Do the images appear in the exact order requested: stage front elevation, then overhead seating, then entrance effects?
Does the text explicitly confirm the venue is an abandoned steel smelting plant and integrate this setting into the design rationale?
Does the text explicitly explain how the spatial design elements echo and reinforce the 'Breaking Through' theme?
Do the generated visuals and text successfully fuse 'industrial ruins' (blast furnace, rust, steel) with 'modern technology' (LEDs, lasers) as requested?
Does the second generated image successfully depict a non-traditional seating arrangement (wraparound, irregular, or organic) distinctly different from standard theater rows?
Does the response translate the abstract 'Breaking Through' theme into concrete spatial metaphors (e.g., breaking barriers, emergence, fracture lines) within the design?
Does the first generated image depict a front elevation rendering (straight-on view) of the main stage?
Does the first generated image clearly incorporate a blast furnace structure combined with LED screens and laser lights?
Does the second generated image present a clear overhead/bird's-eye view of the audience seating area?
Does the third generated image depict a close-up view focusing on dry ice/fog effects and lighting?
Are all generated images free from severe AI artifacts (e.g., malformed trusses, impossible geometry, garbled text, smeared lighting)?
Does the text provide technically sound, practical explanations of the design elements (e.g., screen placement, flow, lighting angles) rather than just high-level description?
Does the first image accurately reflect the specific fusion of industrial and modern elements described in the adjacent text?
Does the second image visually match the specific seating layout description (e.g., wraparound, irregular) provided in the text?
Does the third image accurately depict the specific atmospheric lighting and dry ice effects described in the text?
Is the response free from contradictions between text descriptions and visual depictions (e.g., text says 'circular seating' but image shows rows)?
Do all three images maintain a consistent visual style, color palette, and lighting atmosphere (e.g., dark industrial with bright accents)?
Do all images appear to depict the same venue (abandoned steel smelting plant) with coherent architectural elements?
Is there a logical narrative flow connecting the stage design, audience experience, and entrance effects into a cohesive event story?
